title: helichrysum bracteiferum subsp. andringitranum
intro: Helichrysum bracteiferum subsp. andringitranum, also known as Madagascar or Andringitra Helichrysum, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various medicinal benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant's extracts have been used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, and improving circulation and immune function. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions.
